changelog: Iran connectivity fixes: WebSocket Host header, XHTTP stream-one mode
Improved probe: 4 HTTPS targets, 25s timeout, SOCKS5 fallback
Per-device failure tracking in admin panel
NAT health checker in admin dashboard

Referral QR code and viral loop (v0.9.19 features)
Connecting progress: shows route N of M · Protocol
